summary: PRC Balance Update Bug Fix VERIFIED. The collectInProgressRef fix successfully prevents race condition where re-fetch overwrites optimistic balance update. Balance updates immediately after clicking 'Collect Rewards' and persists correctly.

prc_collect_balance_update.test_case: Click 'Collect Rewards' and verify balance updates immediately
prc_collect_balance_update.result: Balance increased immediately from 33723.31 to 33724.58 PRC (+1.27 PRC)

auto_start_new_session.test_case: After collecting, verify new mining session auto-starts

balance_persistence.test_case: Verify balance persists after 3-second protection window
balance_persistence.result: Balance persisted correctly, no race condition overwrite

critical_code_review_comments: Mining.js collectInProgressRef (line 191): Correctly initialized as useRef(false)

Mining.js collectRewards (lines 498-554): Sets collectInProgressRef.current = true before API call, updates userData.prc_balance optimistically from response.new_balance, calls onBalanceUpdate for global state sync, clears flag after 3 seconds
Mining.js fetchUserData (lines 293-310): Correctly respects collectInProgressRef - skips overwriting prc_balance when collect is in progress
Fix implementation is clean and follows React best practices for preventing race conditions
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRC balance update bug is FIXED. The collectInProgressRef prevents race condition where fetchUserData could overwrite the optimistic balance update. Test user balance is now 33725.02 PRC. Mining session auto-starts after collect. All mining page UI elements working correctly.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: PRC balance not updating on UI after clicking 'Collect Rewards' - success toast appears but balance stays the same
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Race condition where onBalanceUpdate triggered fetchUserData via useEffect, which overwrote the optimistic balance update
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added collectInProgressRef to protect optimistic update for 3 seconds
test_evidence: New session auto-started with timer reset to ~24h
